0196214137158.name: Pokémon TCG ME03 Perfect Order sealed product
0196214137158.note: EAN validated. External retailers list this EAN for German Perfect Order booster/display; Cardmarket has several matching sealed-product pages, so the system returns candidates rather than guessing silently.

candidates.name: Perfect Order Booster
candidates.note: Most likely if scanning a single booster barcode. Some retailers also use the same EAN for display listings, so verify packaging.

candidates.name: Perfect Order Booster Box
candidates.note: Include when scanning display/box packaging or when retailer mapped the same EAN to a display.

candidates.name: Perfect Order Booster Box (18 Boosters)
candidates.note: Returned as a lower-confidence set candidate because the barcode alone may not distinguish packaging variants.
